description: AI-generated voice clone impersonating the customer's boss, requesting an urgent vendor payment.

transaction.purpose: Urgent vendor payment as instructed by director - confidential

risk_factors.description: Voice-instructed urgent payment to unknown vendor matches deepfake scam pattern
Instruction from authority figure creates compliance pressure

expected_explanation: This transaction exhibits hallmarks of deepfake voice-clone fraud. Scammers use AI to clone a boss's voice and instruct urgent, confidential payments to unknown vendors.

expected_conversation.speaker: Agent
expected_conversation.message: This transaction raises serious concerns. You mentioned this was instructed by your director. Did you receive this instruction via a phone call?

expected_conversation.speaker: Customer
expected_conversation.message: Yes, my director called me and asked me to make this payment urgently to a new vendor.

expected_conversation.speaker: Agent
expected_conversation.message: Were you asked to keep this payment confidential or not discuss it with other colleagues?

expected_conversation.speaker: Customer
expected_conversation.message: Yes, he said it's a sensitive deal and I shouldn't discuss it with anyone.

expected_conversation.speaker: Agent
expected_conversation.message: This is a critical red flag. AI voice-cloning technology can now replicate anyone's voice from just a few minutes of audio. The combination of urgency, confidentiality, and a new unknown recipient is the exact pattern of deepfake CEO fraud. I strongly recommend you: 1) Call your director back on their known number. 2) Verify the payment through your company's standard approval process. 3) Do NOT proceed based solely on a phone call.
